title: Phialodiscus zambesiacus
taxonomy: Phialodiscus zambesiacus is classified within the family Annonaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Phialodiscus, which consists of species found in Africa. Phialodiscus zambesiacus is a member of the order Magnoliales, a group of flowering plants. The family Annonaceae is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as the custard apple family. Within the Annonaceae family, Phialodiscus zambesiacus is one of several species that are native to the tropical regions of Africa.
